name: 11"x11" Natural Weave Outdoor Back Cushion Gray - Threshold™
description:
Make your outdoor space look stylish and cozy with this Natural Weave Outdoor Back Cushion from Threshold™. Made of 100% recycled polyester fabric with polyester filling, this back cushion offers plush comfort and extra support for a relaxed seating experience. The sewn-seam closure gives it a neat finish, while the natural weave pattern in a gray hue helps create a cozy ambiance. Suitable for outdoor use, this UV-resistant cushion stays fresh season after season.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
